Change Your Life Through Martial Arts
Taekwondo · BJJ · Kickboxing in Jasper, GA

North Georgia Martial Arts has been building champions and changing lives since 2010. World-class instructors. Programs for all ages and experience levels. Book your free trial class today.

Your achievement is our mission.

Every student. Every goal. Every belt. We're here every step of the way.

Meet Your Instructor

Expert Instruction, Proven Results

North Georgia Martial Arts has been changing lives through martial arts, education, and coaching in Jasper, GA since 2010. With world-class instructors in Taekwondo, Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, and Kickboxing, we offer a safe, welcoming environment for students of all ages — from first-time beginners to competitive state and national champions.

Owner & Chief Instructor

Damon Easley

Owner & Chief Instructor

Damon Easley is a 4th Degree Black Belt and the founder of North Georgia Martial Arts, which he established in Jasper in 2010. A District Champion and multiple-time State Champion with a globally ranked sparring record, Damon has dedicated 15+ years to martial arts with a mission to change lives one person at a time. Under his leadership, NGMA has grown into a championship-caliber academy where students of all ages find confidence, discipline, and a community that pushes them to be their best.

Why North Georgia Martial Arts

The North Georgia Martial Arts Difference

We don't just teach Taekwondo & Martial Arts — we build better people.

Serious Black Belt School

Students earn every belt by demonstrating real technique — we don't hand out ranks. With a 5.0-star Google rating and 16 years in Jasper, our standards speak for themselves.

Welcoming to All Ages & Levels

From young kids to adults, complete beginners to returning martial artists — everyone feels at home at North Georgia Martial Arts. This is a family, not just a gym.

Results You Can See

Parents and students report improvements in focus, confidence, and discipline within the first 30–60 days. Our structured curriculum ensures every student progresses at every level.

What We Offer

Our Programs

Something for everyone — from toddlers to adults, beginners to competitors.

Ages 4–7

Tiny Tigers

Designed for our youngest students, Tiny Tigers introduces the building blocks of Taekwondo — balance, coordination, basic kicks, and following instructions — in a fun, age-appropriate setting. Smaller class sizes and patient instruction help kids build confidence and self-control that carries right into school and at home.

Mon, Wed & Thu 45-min classes
Ages 7–15

Kids Taekwondo

Our core kids Taekwondo program guides students from white belt all the way through black belt, developing discipline, focus, and real martial arts skill at every step. Belt-specific classes ensure your child trains with peers at their level — and competition opportunities are available for students ready to take their training further.

Mon–Sat 60-min classes
Ages 13+

Teens & Adults TKD

Adult and teen Taekwondo at NGMA is a serious discipline and a serious workout — led by Damon Easley, a 4th Degree Black Belt and nationally ranked competitor. Build fitness, sharpen self-defense skills, and train alongside a community of adults who push each other to improve, regardless of starting experience level.

Mon, Tue, Wed, Fri & Sat 60-min classes
Ages 13+

Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu

NGMA's BJJ program offers both Gi and No-Gi training under experienced competition coaches. Whether you're a complete beginner or a seasoned grappler, our classes build technical ground game, physical conditioning, and competition-ready skills in a mat culture that's welcoming at every level.

Mon, Tue, Thu & Sat 60-min classes
Ages 13+

Kickboxing

High-energy, technique-driven kickboxing classes that build striking power, cardio, and coordination fast. Led by Thomas Prisco and Zach Bjork — coaches with real competitive records — NGMA kickboxing is intense but accessible: a genuine full-body workout with skills you can actually use.

Tue, Thu & Fri 60-min classes
Simple Process

How To Get Started

Three easy steps to your first class — no experience required.

1

Book Your Free Trial

Click the button below or call us at (706) 692-7600 to reserve your free intro session at a time that works for you.

2

Come Try It Out

Arrive in comfortable workout clothes. We'll give you a tour, introduce you to the team, and guide you through your first class.

3

Join the Family

If you love it — and you will — we'll find the perfect program and membership that fits your goals, schedule, and budget.

No commitment. No experience needed. Just show up.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need any experience to start? +
Absolutely not! Most of our students start with zero martial arts experience. Our intro classes are specifically designed for complete beginners. Our instructors will meet you exactly where you are and guide you step by step.
How old do kids need to be to start? +
We welcome students as young as 4 years old. Our programs are grouped by age so every student trains at exactly the right level. Call us at (706) 692-7600 and we'll help you find the perfect fit.
How much does membership cost? +
We offer several membership options to fit different budgets and goals. Fill out the Starter Kit form and one of our coaches will send you our full pricing guide, class schedule, and current promotions — no commitment required.
What should I wear to my first class? +
For your free trial, just wear comfortable athletic clothes — shorts and a t-shirt are perfect. No special equipment or uniform is needed until you decide to join.
How often should I train to see results? +
We recommend training 2–3 times per week for consistent progress. Most students notice real improvements in fitness, focus, and technique within the first 30–60 days.
Is martial arts safe for my child? +
Safety is our top priority, especially for our youngest students. All classes are structured, supervised, and taught with age-appropriate techniques. Martial arts is consistently ranked among the safest youth sports.
Do you offer family discounts? +
Yes! We offer family membership packages for households with multiple training members. Ask about our family rates during your free trial.
What if I can't make it to classes regularly? +
Life happens! We offer flexible make-up class policies and some membership tiers include open mat times so you can train around your schedule. Just talk to us — we'll find a solution.
